name: data-tables-handler
description: Processes overlay-related CSV data table uploads to Parquet + column stats on R2. Intentionally omitted from lerna.json: the duckdb native dep compiles from source on unsupported Node ABIs and makes CI lerna bootstrap take ~40m. Install deps in this package directly (or via Docker). Track migration to @duckdb/node-api in https://github.com/seasketch/next/issues/971.
